title: Amtech G3200 30cm (12") Wrecking bar
features: DURABLE: This 30cm (12") wrecking bar is made from strong drop forged steel for durability
VERSATILE: With chisel and swan neck ends, this utility bar is ideal for dismantling timber work, opening wooden cases and removing nails
SIZE CAPACITY: 12 inch / 30 cm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning Yes Box Contains 1x Wrecking Bar See more
